_meta.purpose: Golden-number fixtures from JDM's live xlsx casework — inputs + expected outputs for QUE calc tool validation. NOT WIRED TO TESTS YET.
caveats: Dowell tabs (Gerald + Kathy) are empty templates in the source xlsx — row 13-15 values are copy-paste artifacts from the Griffin master, not real Dowell projections.
Wilkening / Pyle / Seeger / Ann Blotz tabs sampled but not inventoried here — same Income Comparison template.
GMIB Payout % column in Income Comparison Master is marked 'SEE BELOW' — payout rate by attained age lives in a lookup table not embedded in the sheet.
Formulas use =TODAY() and date arithmetic — fixtures captured on 2026-04-14/15; re-extraction on a different date will produce different row-1 age values.
